data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choices to reduce decision-making time and cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures interactive elements are large enough and reachable based on expected usage.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design, prioritization of primary action buttons

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses on the vital few features that bring the most value to users.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Features an aesthetically pleasing interface to enhance perceived usability.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Encourages user engagement by using incomplete elements to entice further interaction.
